name: Tiger Claw
description: A sharp claw from a mutated tiger beast. Used to unlock Bone Claw.

name: Snake Venom
description: Toxic venom extracted from a mutated snake. Used to unlock Venom Fang.

name: Boar Hide
description: Thick hide from a wild mutant boar. Used to unlock Thick Hide.

name: Bear Bone
description: A dense bone fragment from a mutant bear. Used to unlock Bone Plating.

name: Rabbit Foot
description: A lightweight foot from a fast rabbit beast. Used to unlock Swift Legs.

name: Echo Membrane
description: A sensitive membrane from a cave bat. Used to unlock Echolocation.

name: Small Med Kit
description: Restores 20 HP to one living ally.

name: Med Kit
description: Restores 30 HP to one living ally.

name: Advanced Med Kit
description: Restores 50 HP to one living ally.

name: Adrenal Serum I
description: Raises one living ally's Attack by 1 combat stage.

name: Adrenal Serum II
description: Raises one living ally's Attack by 2 combat stages.

name: Sprint Serum I
description: Raises one living ally's Speed by 1 combat stage.

name: Sprint Serum II
description: Raises one living ally's Speed by 2 combat stages.

name: Revive Shot I
description: Revives one defeated ally with 30 HP.

name: Revive Shot II
description: Revives one defeated ally with 60 HP.

name: Alpha Core
description: The unstable core driving the mutation outbreak. Proof that Alpha Chimera was contained.
